name: MSI B840 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (B840GPW)
shortName: MSI B840 GAMING PLUS WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0
description: Mid-range ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with B840 chipset, DDR5, and Wi-Fi 7 for gaming and mainstream use.
